items.title_en: Israel Struck an Iranian Steel Facility. Was It a Valid Military Target?
items.summary_en: During the war, Israel attacked Iran’s steel plants, saying they provided forces with revenue and the means to make weapons, but it also hurt the civilian economy.
items.title_od: ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏକ ଇରାନୀୟ ଇସ୍ପାତ କାରଖାନା ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲା । ଏହା କ’ଣ ଏକ ବୈଧ ସାମରିକ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ଥିଲା?
items.summary_od: ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ସମୟରେ, ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଇରାନର ଇସ୍ପାତ କାରଖାନା ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରି କହିଥିଲା ଯେ ସେମାନେ ସେନାବାହିନୀକୁ ରାଜସ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଅସ୍ତ୍ରଶସ୍ତ୍ର ତିଆରି କରିବାର ମାଧ୍ୟମ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରୁଥିଲେ, କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହା ବେସାମରିକ ଅର୍ଥବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାକୁ ମଧ୍ୟ କ୍ଷତି ପହଞ୍ଚାଇଥିଲା।

items.title_en: Man Arrested in Killing of U.K. Ex-Lawmaker Is Released
items.summary_en: The police said the 26-year-old was no longer part of the investigation into the death of Ann Widdecombe and urged anyone with information about the crime to come forward.
items.title_od: ବ୍ରିଟେନର ପୂର୍ବତନ ଆଇନ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିବା ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଗିରଫ

items.title_en: England and Norway, Old Friends, Resurrect a Rivalry for the World Cup
items.summary_en: Along with historic and diplomatic ties, England’s club soccer teams have loyal fans in Norway. On Saturday, supporters will have to pick a side.

items.title_en: Inside the Secret Factory That Supplies Ukraine’s War Drones

items.title_en: Trump Accounts Prompt Parents to Start Saving Early for Their Kids
items.summary_en: Between Trump accounts and child-friendly investment platforms, it has become much easier for parents to invest for their children’s future.

items.title_en: Kansas City, the Smallest World Cup Host, Has the World at Its Feet

items.summary_od: ଏହି କ୍ରୀଡ଼ାର ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଦେଇ, ଏହି ସହର ଏକ ଗର୍ବିତ ଇତିହାସ ରହିଛି, ଯାହା ଲାମାର ହଣ୍ଟଙ୍କ ଯୋଗୁଁ ସମ୍ଭବ ହୋଇଛି, ଯିଏକି କାନ୍‌ସାସ୍‌ ସିଟି ଚିଫ୍‌ର ମାଲିକ ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ମେଜର ଲିଗ୍‌ ସକର ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିଥିଲେ।

items.title_en: Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza on Foot

items.title_en: Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack

items.title_en: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary_en: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

items.summary_od: ୟୁ.ଏସ୍. ଷ୍ଟକ୍‌ଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଅଧିକାଂଶରେ କମ୍ ଥିଲା, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ନାସ୍‌ଡାକ୍‌ ହ୍ରାସ ଦିଗରେ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ଥିଲା, କାରଣ ଏଆଇ ଭିତ୍ତିଭୂମି ନିର୍ମାତାମାନେ ତୀବ୍ର ହ୍ରାସ ଭୋଗିଥିଲେ, ଅନେକଙ୍କ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଦୁଇ ଅଙ୍କରେ ଥିଲା। ଏନ୍‌ଭିଡିଆ 16% ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିଲା ।

items.summary_en: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.summary_od: ସୁନା 1.4% ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇ, ଗତ ତିନିଟି ଅଧିବେଶନରେ ଦୁଇଥର ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିଲା, ଏବଂ ରୂପା 2.5% ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇ, ଗତ ଚାରିଟି ଅଧିବେଶନରେ ତିନିଥର ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଥିଲା।
